storyHook: 看天出门，谈晴雨与穿衣

narrative.when: 早上七点，甲准备出门上班
narrative.where: 甲家窗边，看着外面的天空
narrative.who: 甲（出门的人）· 乙（同住的家人）
narrative.how: 看窗外天色，商量穿什么、带不带伞
narrative.method: 看天空云雨、决定穿衣、带伞或外套、出门前再确认
narrative.event: 天气预报说下午会变天，甲怕淋雨耽误下班

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Sky looks grey. What is your idea?
turns.zh: 天灰蒙蒙的，你有什么想法？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Clouds are moving quick. It may rain after some time.
turns.zh: 云走得急，过一阵可能要下雨。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The earth is dry now, but the air is wet.
turns.zh: 地面还是干的，但空气潮潮的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, the weather said rain after the middle of the day.
turns.zh: 嗯，预报说下午有雨。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: So I need a coat and an umbrella?
turns.zh: 那我得穿外套带伞？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I would take a light coat. That thin one over there.
turns.zh: 我会拿那件薄外套，就那边那件。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: But it's twenty degrees. Won't I be too warm?
turns.zh: 可今天二十度呢，穿那个不会热吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Better warm than wet. You can take it off inside.
turns.zh: 湿了可比热了难受，进屋还能脱。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I'll take that one and the umbrella.
turns.zh: 好的。我拿那件，再带把伞。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. The umbrella is by the door. I'll get it.
turns.zh: 好，伞在门边，我去拿。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. The wind is getting up now.
turns.zh: 谢了。这会儿风越来越大了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I saw the trees shaking. Put the coat on before you go out.
turns.zh: 嗯，我看见树在晃。出门前把外套穿上。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. Will the rain come before five?
turns.zh: 好。雨五点前会下吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Hard to say. The clouds are moving quick, so it may come early.
turns.zh: 难说。云走得快，可能来得早。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Then I'll keep the umbrella in my bag, ready.
turns.zh: 那我伞放包里，随时能拿出来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Your bag has a side pocket for it.
turns.zh: 好。你包侧面有个口袋放伞。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I put it there. The coat is light but warm.
turns.zh: 嗯，我放那了。这外套又轻又暖。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is a good one for this sort of weather. Not too thick.
turns.zh: 这种天气穿正合适，不厚。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I hope it keeps the wind out. My ears get cold.
turns.zh: 希望它能挡风，我耳朵怕冷。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have a hat in the box.
turns.zh: 我记得你有个帽子，在柜子里。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will take that as well. Better safe than sad.
turns.zh: 我也带上吧。有备无患。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Now your hands are full. Coat, hat, umbrella.
turns.zh: 得，现在你手上可满了。外套、帽子、伞。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I'll put the hat in my pocket. It folds flat.
turns.zh: 帽子放口袋，能折平。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. You are ready for anything now.
turns.zh: 聪明。这下啥都不怕了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Almost. I will have another look out the window.
turns.zh: 差不多了。我再往外看一眼。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The clouds are moving quick. It will rain by three.
turns.zh: 云走得快，三点前肯定下雨。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I hope I am back before that. My coat is light.
turns.zh: 但愿我能在下雨前回来。这外套有点薄。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You have the umbrella. That is your roof for the day.
turns.zh: 你有伞，那就是你今天的屋顶。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: True. But I do not like walking with a wet head.
turns.zh: 倒也是。可我不喜欢淋湿脑袋。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then keep the hat on. It will keep your ears warm too.
turns.zh: 那就把帽子戴上，耳朵也暖和。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Is my bag shut? I do not like rain inside.
turns.zh: 好。我包关好了吗？不想让雨进去。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, the top is tight. Your things are safe.
turns.zh: 关紧了，东西淋不到。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. What time is it now? I have a meeting at nine.
turns.zh: 那就好。现在几点了？我九点有个会。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Ten to eight. You have time for a cup of tea.
turns.zh: 差十分八点。你还能喝杯茶。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No time. I will get one on the road. okay.
turns.zh: 来不及了。路上买一杯。回头见。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me have a look at the weather on my little box.
turns.zh: 等等，我看下小盒子上的天气。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It says rain at three this afternoon.
turns.zh: 说下午三点有雨。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is after my meeting. I will be on the road then.
turns.zh: 那是我开完会之后，正好在路上。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: So the umbrella is a good idea. Keep it near.
turns.zh: 所以带伞是对的，放近处。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will put it in my coat pocket. Ready now.
turns.zh: 我放外套口袋里。准备好了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Is that coat dry in the rain?
turns.zh: 那件外套下雨天穿着会干吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, it is. The maker said it keeps water out.
turns.zh: 防的。卖家说能挡水。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Then I will not take the umbrella.
turns.zh: 好，那我就不带伞了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Better take it. The wind may be strong.
turns.zh: 还是带上吧，风可能大。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: True. The coat has a cover for the head, though.
turns.zh: 也是。不过外套有帽子。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A head cover is not as good as an umbrella in a hard rain.
turns.zh: 下大雨时头罩不如伞。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will put it in my bag.
turns.zh: 好的。我放包里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put it where you can get it in a short time.
turns.zh: 放在好拿的地方。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put it in the side pocket.
turns.zh: 我放侧袋里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now you are ready. Have a good day.
turns.zh: 好。现在准备好了。祝你顺利。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One more thing. Is your coat warm enough?
turns.zh: 还有一件事。你的外套够暖和吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is light but warm. The wind will not get in.
turns.zh: 轻便但保暖，风进不来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What about your shoes? Are they good for rain?
turns.zh: 那你的鞋呢？下雨能穿吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: They are leather. Not the best for water, but good for a short walk.
turns.zh: 是皮的。不太防水，但走一小段没问题。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You could take my old boots. They are by the door.
turns.zh: 你可以穿我的旧靴子，就在门边。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, they are too great for me. I will be quick.
turns.zh: 不用，太大了。我走快点就行。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. If the rain gets hard, keep back till it is soft.
turns.zh: 行。如果雨下大了，就等雨小再走。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. There is a store near the office with a cover over the door.
turns.zh: 我会的。办公室附近有家店，门口有遮雨棚。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Then you have a place to keep dry.
turns.zh: 好，那你有地方避雨。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I am off now. okay this evening.
turns.zh: 嗯，我走了。晚上见。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Your coat. Is the top up?
turns.zh: 你的外套。帽子翻出来了吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, it is inside the collar. I will put it up if needed.
turns.zh: 嗯，在领子里。需要就翻出来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. And your bag? Will it keep dry?
turns.zh: 好。那你的包呢？能防水吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is cloth, but I have a cover inside made of hard material.
turns.zh: 布的，但我里面有个硬质材料的套子。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. You have thought of everything.
turns.zh: 很好。你想得挺周全。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not all. I have no gloves. But it is not so cold.
turns.zh: 也不是。手套忘带了，不过没那么冷。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You may take my other one. It is in the drawer.
turns.zh: 你可以拿我另一个，在抽屉里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, I will be all right. My hands will be in my pockets.
turns.zh: 不用了，没事。手放口袋里就行。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do as you like. The wind may get stronger after a time.
turns.zh: 随你。等会儿风可能会变大。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, I am off now.
turns.zh: 好了，我走了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let me see the sky again.
turns.zh: 我再看看天。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The clouds are moving quicker now.
turns.zh: 云现在走得更快了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. Rain will come before four.
turns.zh: 嗯，四点前会下雨。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then I will keep the coat on. And the umbrella is in my bag.
turns.zh: 那我穿着外套，伞也放包里了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Keep it where you can get it quick.
turns.zh: 好，放在随手能拿到的地方。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is in the side pocket. Not hard to get.
turns.zh: 在侧袋里，不难拿。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What about your shoes? Are they good on wet earth?
turns.zh: 你鞋子呢？湿地上不打滑吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: These are leather. They keep water out well enough.
turns.zh: 皮的，防水还行。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Then you are ready. Have a good day.
turns.zh: 行，那准备好了。祝你一天顺利。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks. okay this evening.
turns.zh: 谢了，晚上见。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One minute. The wind is getting up. Does your coat have a cover for the head?
turns.zh: 等一下。风变大了。你那外套有头套吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, it is in the collar. I can put it up if needed.
turns.zh: 有的，在领子里，需要的话可以翻出来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Put it up now. The wind will make your hair wet.
turns.zh: 现在就戴上吧，风会把头发打湿。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. There, it is up. How do I look?
turns.zh: 好主意。好了，戴上了。看起来怎么样？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Like a man on a ship. But it will keep you dry.
turns.zh: 像船上的一个人，不过能保你干爽。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right! I will take that. Better than a wet head.
turns.zh: 对！我接受这个说法，总比淋湿头好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The rain may come before you are part way there.
turns.zh: 雨可能在你走到一半时就下来了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then I will go quicker. Or take a short way.
turns.zh: 那我就走快点，或者抄近路。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The short cut by the old wall? That gets wet and dirty.
turns.zh: 老墙那边的近路？那里容易变得又湿又脏。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see. But with these shoes and the coat, I am ready.
turns.zh: 我明白。但穿着这鞋和外套，我准备好了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What about your bag? Is it safe from the rain?
turns.zh: 你的包呢？能防雨吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is not. But I have a cover for it inside.
turns.zh: 不能，不过里面有个包罩。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Then put it on now. No need to keep back.
turns.zh: 那就现在套上，不用等了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are right. Here, I will do it now.
turns.zh: 说得对。来，我现在就弄。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. You are ready for the rain now.
turns.zh: 好。你现在准备好应对下雨了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I am ready for anything from the sky.
turns.zh: 是啊，天上掉什么我都不怕。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Then off you go. Have a good day at work.
turns.zh: 那就出发吧，上班愉快。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. I will okay this evening.
turns.zh: 谢了，晚上见你。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: be safe. And keep an eye on the sky.
turns.zh: 路上小心，多看看天。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. If it gets bad, I will keep still till it is soft.
turns.zh: 会的。要是雨大了，我就等小了再回。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a good idea. No need to get wet.
turns.zh: 好主意，没必要淋湿。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Well, I am off now.
turns.zh: 嗯，那我走啦。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Go on then. Keep your cover in mind.
turns.zh: 去吧，别忘了包罩。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: alright then.
turns.zh: 回头见。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: sure. I will have a warm drink for you.
turns.zh: 好的，我给你备杯热饮。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That sounds great. sure!
turns.zh: 太好了，好的！

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: sure! And mind the step.
turns.zh: 拜！当心台阶。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will be back before the rain gets bad.
turns.zh: 好，我赶在下大雨前回来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I will keep the soup warm for you.
turns.zh: 好，我给你温着汤。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is kind. See you again!
turns.zh: 你真好，回头见！

storyBlurb: 早上七点，甲站在窗边看天，犹豫要不要带伞。乙提醒天气预报说下午有雨，两人商量着穿什么外套出门。
storyScript:
【开场·看窗外】清晨七点，窗外的天空灰蒙蒙的，云层压得很低。甲站在窗边，手指轻轻敲着窗框，目光追随着远处一片移动的云。乙端着热茶走过来，也探头看了一眼外面：这云走得急，怕是午后要变天。甲皱眉，想起天气预报确实说过下午会有阵雨，可眼下地面还是干的，阳光偶尔从云缝里漏下来，照得窗台上的绿植叶片发亮。到底要不要带伞呢？甲犹豫着，手指无意识地摸了摸外套口袋里的手机，仿佛想从天气App里找到确切的答案。

【进行·决定穿衣】乙放下茶杯，走到衣柜前，抽出一件薄风衣递给甲：穿这件吧，防风又防水，万一淋了雨也不怕。甲接过来摸了摸面料，轻软却密实，领口还有个小帽子。可今天最高气温有二十度呢，穿这个会不会热？甲把风衣抖开比了比，又看了看窗外——风把树枝吹得微微摇晃，看来风不小。乙又从抽屉里翻出一把折叠伞，塞进甲的包里：带着吧，就算不下雨，挡挡风也好。甲点点头，把风衣套上，拉链拉到一半，又觉得领口有点闷，于是把袖子挽了两圈，露出小臂。

【进行·出门准备】甲背上包，在玄关换鞋时又回头看了一眼窗外。云层似乎更厚了，有一片暗灰色的云正缓缓移过来，像一块浸了水的棉絮。乙递过保温杯，甲接过来，顺手把伞从包里抽出来检查了一下——伞骨完好，伞面没有破洞。甲把伞重新塞进包侧袋，拉好拉链。乙说：要是下午雨大，你就在公司多待一会儿，等雨小了再回来。甲笑着应了一声，推开门，一阵凉风扑面而来，带着潮湿的泥土气息。甲缩了缩脖子，把风衣的拉链拉到头，迈步走进清晨的微光里。

【收束·出门准备】门在身后关上，乙听见脚步声沿着走廊远去。窗外的天空又亮了一些，云层裂开一道缝，阳光斜斜地照进来，在木地板上投下一块金色的光斑。乙端起已经微凉的茶，望着窗外甲的身影渐渐走远，风衣下摆被风吹起又落下。天气预报说下午有雨，但愿那把伞用不上。乙轻轻叹了口气，转身去收拾餐桌，盘算着晚上要不要熬一锅热汤。
